column3: 雪球排成一条蜿蜒的长队挡住了前路\n最前面是一张咧嘴笑的脑袋\n雪蛇无声地嘶鸣
column4: A winding trail of snowballs blocked the path ahead\nAnd at the front a grinning head\nThe snow-snake hissed without a sound

column3: 卡罗尔高高举起提灯\n若她能及时晃花它\n也许蛇尾就会乱了阵脚
column4: Carol raised her lantern high\nIf she could dazzle it in time\nMaybe the tail would lose its rhyme

column3: 散落的雪不再滚动\n洞穴出奇地安静\n卡罗尔呼气继续向前
column4: The scattered snow stopped rolling\nThe cave felt oddly quiet\nCarol exhaled and stepped beyond it

column3: 下一关再有什么都先喘口气\n她挺过了这场雪的威胁
column4: Whatever waited next could wait a breath\nShe had survived the snowy threat

column3: 一种不属于冬天的寒意沿着石缝爬行\n气流呜咽处有什么在飘荡
column4: A chill that wasn't winter crawled along the stones\nA shape drifted where the draft moaned

column3: 卡罗尔稳住颤抖的手\n她不会逃离空气\n她要正面迎上幽灵
column4: Carol steadied her shaking hands\nShe would not run from empty air\nShe would meet the ghost right there

column3: 灵体越来越淡\n像晨雾一样溜走\n只在她腕上留下一点霜
column4: The spirit flickered thin and thin\nThen slipped away like morning mist\nLeaving only frost on her wrist

column3: 卡罗尔又听了一会儿\n大厅里只剩寂静\n只有她的脚步
column4: Carol listened for another sigh\nBut the hall was still\nOnly her footsteps passed by

column3: 一团污黑沿着墙滑动\n快得不像是污渍
column4: A smudge of black slid along the wall\nToo quick to be a stain at all

column3: 卡罗尔追逐那道游影\n它窜进烛光照不到的角落\n像一场停不下来的捉迷藏
column4: Carol chased the moving shade\nIt darted where the candles failed\nA game of tag that never paled

column3: 影子聚拢又升起如烟\n然后摊平溜走\n仿佛从未停留
column4: The shadow pooled and rose like smoke\nThen folded flat and slipped away\nAs if it never chose to stay

column3: 卡罗尔在心里记下位置\n不管那是什么她已把它甩在身后\n她还有光能指路
column4: Carol marked the spot in her mind\nWhatever it was she left behind\nShe still had light to help her find

column3: 洞穴又冷又旧\n有什么在舔一口偷来的铃铛\n卡罗尔大喊那不该你卖
column4: The cave breathed cold and old\nSomething licked a stolen bell\nCarol yelled that's not yours to sell

column3: 人影一缩把战利品抱紧\n吃相狼狈却衣着讲究\n圣诞规矩可不讲情
column4: The figure flinched and hugged the loot\nA messy eater in a fancy suit\nChristmas rules were absolute

column3: 也许他骨子里不算坏\n只是又吵又饿又爱炫\n偷这座镇子仍不对
column4: Maybe he wasn't wicked deep down\nJust hungry loud and oddly proud\nStill wrong to steal from this town

column3: 卡罗尔指向远处的光\n想吃饱就跟上\n但先去学唱诗班的歌
column4: Carol pointed toward the distant glow\nIf you want a feast then come and go\nBut learn the songs the choir knows

column3: 他们踏进雪里的空气\n寒夜里上了一课陌生人\n也许这样也不错
column4: They stepped into the snowy air\nA stranger lesson one cold night\nBut maybe that was kind of right

column3: 一道细黑线像墨汁一样裂开地板\n它呼吸着像某种即将苏醒的东西
column4: A thin black line split the floor like ink\nIt breathed like something on the brink

column3: 卡罗尔绕开些距离看它蔓延\n裂缝跟着她的脚步\n像一张等着进食的嘴
column4: Carol circled wide and watched it spread\nA crack that followed where she tread\nA trap that hungered to be fed

column3: 裂隙在霜里合上归于平静\n木板记起自己只是地板\n而不是敞开的海
column4: The fissure sealed with frost and calm\nThe boards remembered how to be\nA floor and not an open sea

column3: 卡罗尔轻敲木板\n刚才张开的已不再\n她还有铃铛和呼吸
column4: Carol tapped the wood with care\nWhatever opened wasn't there\nShe still had bells and breath to spare
